name: Acosta Table Lamp - 21.25 Inch Height - TBL4505 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Acosta table lamp. At 21.25 inches tall, this sleek black lamp embodies modern elegance, seamlessly blending into any decor style. Crafted from sturdy iron, it offers stability and strength, making it a standout piece for any room. Its minimalist design ensures it complements both contemporary and classic settings alike. Whether placed in a living room or used as a bedside lamp, the Acosta adds a touch of sophistication and functionality. Bring an inviting glow to your home and create an ambiance of warmth and style with this beautifully designed lamp.
